concerns.text: Task implements OLS regression instead of fixed-effects regression required by spec FR-006. T040a documents deviation but does not fulfill the requirement. FR-006 explicitly mandates 'fixed-effects regression models' with dataset/model as fixed covariates.

Task explicitly excludes DP-difference vs DI-ratio correlation pairs. FR-005 requires 'all pairwise correlations between all metric pairs' without authorization for this exclusion. Plan.md Phase 3 Step 3 documents this but spec does not permit the exclusion.

No tasks include the Reference-Validator Agent citation verification workflow mandated by Constitution Principle II. Plan.md Constitution Check claims PASS but tasks do not implement the required verification gate.

SC-005 requires power analysis measurement against documentation in research.md, but no task guarantees research.md contains the required power analysis before analysis execution. This creates a race condition where analysis may run without documented power adequacy.

Constitution Principle I requires random seeds pinned throughout code/, but tasks only pin seeds in specific modules without an audit task to verify comprehensive seed pinning across all code paths. Reproducibility cannot be verified without this audit.

FR-009 requires 'metric selection guidance' but tasks shift terminology to 'associational guidance'. This is documented as FR-008 compliance but should be explicitly staged in spec.md rather than silently changed in tasks.

Constitution Principle III requires no in-place data modifications, but task only stores preprocessed datasets with checksums without explicit verification that raw data remains unmodified. Should add verification step.

Constitution Principle VII requires effect sizes and confidence intervals for all statistical outputs, but no verification task ensures all correlation and regression outputs include these metrics. Should add verification step.
